title: Customer Churn Predictor
description: An end-to-end Machine Learning pipeline predicting telecom customer churn risk. Built to demonstrate full-stack MLOps capabilities by transitioning a Jupyter-trained classification model into a production-ready, cloud-hosted web application.  Long Description / Highlights (For the detailed project page):  Dynamic Feature Padding: Engineered a custom Flask middleware layer that dynamically maps UI inputs and injects zero-padded baselines to prevent Scikit-Learn strict shape-mismatch errors from partial payloads.  Cross-OS Deployment Resolution: Architected a pivot from C-array dependent models to math-based models (Logistic Regression) to bypass Windows-to-Linux serialization (pickle) corruption on cloud servers.  Decoupled Architecture: Deployed a Next.js UI on Vercel edge networks, communicating securely with a containerized Python backend hosted on Render via CORS-enabled REST endpoints.

title: Slimsnaps Pipeline Intelligence CRM
description:
Built a high-performance, secure lead management system and automated data pipeline designed to bridge dynamic server-side routing with cloud data architecture.

Cloud Architecture & Fail-safes: Engineered the application to run within an isolated Linux container via Azure App Service, utilizing secure environment variables (DB_SERVER, DB_UID, DB_PWD) to protect database credentials.

Relational Database Integrity: Implemented a robust data layer talking directly to an Azure SQL Server instance using ODBC Driver 18, configured with strict TLS cloud encryption (Encrypt=yes) and certificate validation overrides for seamless database handshakes.

Automated Deployment Pipeline: Architected an end-to-end continuous integration and continuous deployment (CI/CD) pipeline via GitHub Actions. Any backend schema modifications, style updates, or route adjustments pushed to GitHub automatically trigger server builds, library updates via a managed dependency footprint (requirements.txt), and zero-downtime hot reloads on the production site.

title: Custom Data Cleaning Library
description: Developed a reusable Python library for automated wrangling, anomaly detection, and preprocessing across large enterprise datasets.

title: Sales-Analytics
description:
This project is an interactive Power BI dashboard built using the Adventure Works dataset. The objective was to transform raw transactional data into actionable business intelligence, allowing stakeholders to transition from asking "what happened" to understanding "why it happened."

The dashboard consolidates sales data into a single decision-support platform, enabling deep exploration into product profitability, geographic trends, and demographic influences.
